testGuidance:
Select this test image 
'Tests/_InputImages/Test_8bit_YX_BinaryCylinder1_MaxIP.tif'

Then press Open.
When the prompt asks you if you want to select more images, click YES and select the image 
'Tests/_InputImages/Test_8bit_YX_BinaryCylinder2_MaxIP.tif'

Then Press Open
When the prompt asks you if you want to select more images, hit NO.

WARNING: GT file contains hardcoded paths.
Check these before running the test.
